name: Passive Provider News
description: Collecte les news providers IA generales dans /vault/raw/passive/provider-news, separement des releases CLI et des releases modeles.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'google/gemini-2.0-flash-lite-001', models: ['meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct', 'qwen/qwen-2.5-72b-instruct', 'deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3-0324'], messages: [ { role: 'user', content: $json.summary_prompt } ], response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 300, provider: { allow_fallbacks: true, sort: { by: 'throughput', partition: 'none' } } } }}
